evidence_summary: The norm of the gradients can be self-stabilized using a mechanism that depends on the variance of the weight gradient.
Batch normalization can be applied to any set of activations in the network to address internal covariate shift.
The combination of update to normalization parameters and subsequent change in normalization can lead to no change in the output of the layer nor the loss.
